description: Fix four confirmed bugs in server.js: (1) add num.permanent = true in /api/agent/remove-interested, (2) add num.permanent = true in /api/admin/remove-interested, (3) remove unused const now in getNextNumber, (4) trim dialedLog entries older than 90 days in checkDailyReset
steps: In /api/agent/remove-interested handler, add num.permanent = true after num.disposition = 'dead'
In /api/admin/remove-interested handler, add num.permanent = true after num.disposition = 'dead'
In getNextNumber(), remove the unused 'const now = new Date();' line
In checkDailyReset(), add dialedLog trimming to remove entries older than 90 days
acceptance_criteria: Both remove-interested endpoints set num.permanent = true
checkDailyReset trims dialedLog to only keep entries from the last 90 days
findings: All 4 fixes applied cleanly. node -c server.js passes syntax check. Changes are minimal and targeted.
